overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City's Japantown district at night. The camera moves under a prominent red neon archway and past towering holographic advertisements on cylindrical buildings, with heavy neon lighting in red, green, and blue hues illuminating the futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk street under traditional Japanese archway

events.description: black sedan passes on the left side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: driving forward through the multi-lane street under the red neon archway, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese archway with glowing red neon kanji characters spanning across the road
tall cylindrical building covered in rotating holographic advertisements and digital screens
elevated highway or monorail track with green and red structural beams running parallel to the street
large turquoise holographic billboard advertising food with vibrant graphics
bright cyan digital billboard with bold text advertising a product

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight through a futuristic cyberpunk street dominated by a massive red neon archway overhead. To the left, a cylindrical tower displays rotating holographic advertisements, while the right side features elevated highway structures and bright digital billboards. Sparse traffic moves alongside as the camera maintains a steady forward trajectory through the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving downtown street with large digital billboards

events.description: red neon archway exits view as vehicle moves past it
vehicle begins turning right around the curve

agents.ego_description: navigating a gradual right turn while passing large holographic advertisements on the right

entered.detail: large digital billboard featuring 'EL GUAPO' text with a stylized graphic of a helmeted figure
white digital sign with pink 'nicola' text and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Having passed the red archway, the vehicle continues along the curving street where new digital billboards come into view on the right, including a prominent 'El Guapo' advertisement. The cylindrical holographic tower recedes into the left background as the camera begins a right turn, revealing more of the elevated highway structure and additional neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved cyberpunk street with waterfront view and towering advertisements

events.description: large 'When You Are Sky High' billboard comes into close view on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved road past various holographic advertisements with distant skyscrapers visible ahead

notable_agents.action: distant car with red taillights visible ahead on the road

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH' text with a stylized face graphic
cluster of futuristic glass skyscrapers visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the right-curving road with the cylindrical holographic tower now closer on the left. New billboards appear on the right including a prominent 'When You Are Sky High' advertisement. The view opens up to reveal distant glass skyscrapers ahead, while the elevated highway structure remains visible overhead. Sparse traffic continues to move along the multi-lane neon-lit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk corridor that gradually curves to reveal a sprawling futuristic skyline. It begins by driving straight beneath a massive red neon archway, flanked by a rotating holographic tower on the left and elevated highway structures on the right. As the vehicle passes the arch, the camera follows a rightward curve where the holographic tower recedes and new digital billboards, including an advertisement for El Guapo, emerge along the roadside. The scene then expands as the road continues to bend, bringing a When You Are Sky High billboard into view while the cylindrical tower reappears closer on the left. Finally, the view opens up toward distant glass skyscrapers ahead, maintaining a steady trajectory through the multi-lane street under the looming overhead highway.
